title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India family as a Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
